inputs.label: Quantitative Scaled Score
inputs.businessContext: Scaled score (0-60) on the Quantitative section of the GMAT.

inputs.label: Verbal Scaled Score
inputs.businessContext: Scaled score (0-60) on the Verbal section of the GMAT.

inputs.label: Integrated Reasoning Score
inputs.businessContext: Score on the Integrated Reasoning section (1-8).

inputs.label: Analytical Writing Assessment Score
inputs.businessContext: Score on the Analytical Writing Assessment (0-6, in 0.5 increments).
